name: R Bioconductor Dev (Codespaces)
postCreateCommand: R -e "user_lib <- file.path(Sys.getenv('HOME'), 'R', paste0(version[['arch']], '-conda-linux-gnu-library'), paste0(version[['major']], '.', substr(version[['minor']], 1, 1))); if (!dir.exists(user_lib)) dir.create(user_lib, recursive = TRUE); .libPaths(c(user_lib, .libPaths())); source('.devcontainer/install.R'); remotes::install_local('.', upgrade='never', lib = user_lib)"
